name: Wolkenkraft ViTA
summary: A compact conduction dry-herb vaporiser for patients who want straightforward, pocketable medicating.
description: The Wolkenkraft ViTA is a small one-button conduction vaporiser that heats up in 25 to 30 seconds. Five settings between 180 and 220C, an insulated air path and a ceramic filter keep the vapour clean and reasonably cool. The 1600mAh battery charges over USB-C and supports pass-through use, so you can medicate while it tops up. A sensible entry-level device for patients who want simple operation without much to learn.
